euaa_guidelines.title: Practical Guide on Registration and Lodging of Applications
euaa_guidelines.description: Operational guidance to register and lodge applications for international protection, covering access, timelines and safeguards.

euaa_guidelines.title: Practical Guide on Free Legal Counselling
euaa_guidelines.description: Guidance on the design and organisation of national systems of free legal counselling under CEAS.

euaa_guidelines.title: Practical Guide on Information Provision in the Asylum Procedure
euaa_guidelines.description: Methodological guidance on providing information to applicants throughout the asylum procedure.

euaa_guidelines.title: Practical Guide on Evidence and Risk Assessment
euaa_guidelines.description: Methodology on credibility assessment, COI use and future‑oriented risk assessment.

euaa_guidelines.title: Practical Guide on Audio Recording of Personal Interviews
euaa_guidelines.description: Guidance on establishing lawful and effective audio recording of personal interviews.

euaa_guidelines.title: Guidance on Remote Interviews
euaa_guidelines.description: Standards and safeguards for conducting remote interviews in asylum procedures.

euaa_guidelines.title: Practical Guide on Interpretation in the Asylum Procedure
euaa_guidelines.description: Defines interpreters’ roles, professional standards and quality requirements.

euaa_guidelines.title: Practical Guide on Qualification for International Protection
euaa_guidelines.description: Legal and practical guidance on refugee status and subsidiary protection assessment.

euaa_guidelines.title: Practical Guide on Membership of a Particular Social Group
euaa_guidelines.description: Application of PSG ground including gender‑ and SOGIESC‑related claims.

euaa_guidelines.title: Practical Guide on Nationality
euaa_guidelines.description: Explains nationality and statelessness concepts relevant to protection assessment.

euaa_guidelines.title: Practical Guide on SOGIESC – Examination Procedure
euaa_guidelines.description: Guidance on examining asylum applications based on SOGIESC grounds.

euaa_guidelines.title: Practical Guide on SOGIESC – Reception
euaa_guidelines.description: Standards for reception conditions for applicants with diverse SOGIESC.

euaa_guidelines.title: Guidelines on Alternatives to Detention
euaa_guidelines.description: Framework for defining and applying alternatives to detention in asylum procedures.

euaa_guidelines.title: Guidance on the Dublin Procedure
euaa_guidelines.description: Operational indicators for responsibility determination under Dublin/AMMR logic.

euaa_guidelines.title: Practical Guide on Family Tracing – Part I
euaa_guidelines.description: Best‑interest‑based guidance for tracing families of unaccompanied minors.

euaa_guidelines.title: Practical Guide on Family Tracing – Part II
euaa_guidelines.description: Operational prioritisation of family unity cases under AMMR.

euaa_guidelines.title: Practical Guide on Exclusion for Serious Crimes
euaa_guidelines.description: Legal framework for applying exclusion clauses for serious non‑political crimes.

euaa_guidelines.title: Practical Guide on Quality Assurance in Asylum Procedures
euaa_guidelines.description: Methodology for quality control, review and consistency in asylum decision‑making.

euaa_guidelines.title: Operational Standards and Indicators on the Asylum Procedure
euaa_guidelines.description: EU‑wide operational benchmarks for fair and effective asylum procedures.

euaa_guidelines.title: Operational Standards on Vulnerability-related Aspects
euaa_guidelines.description: Standards for identifying and responding to vulnerability in asylum procedures.

euaa_guidelines.title: Guidance on Contingency Planning and Preparedness
euaa_guidelines.description: Operational guidance for preparedness and crisis response in asylum systems.

euaa_guidelines.title: Practical Guide on the Management of a Reception Centre
euaa_guidelines.description: Guidance on organisation and daily management of reception facilities.

euaa_guidelines.title: Self-Assessment Tool on Quality of the Asylum Procedure
euaa_guidelines.description: Digital self‑assessment tool to monitor quality of national asylum procedures.

euaa_guidelines.title: Asylum Report 2025
euaa_guidelines.description: Annual overview of asylum trends, policy and practice in the EU+.

euaa_guidelines.title: Country Guidance: Explained
euaa_guidelines.description: Methodological framework for EUAA Country Guidance documents.

euaa_guidelines.title: Country Guidance: Syria
euaa_guidelines.description: Common EU+ assessment of protection needs following developments in Syria.

euaa_guidelines.title: Country Guidance: Iran
euaa_guidelines.description: Updated country guidance on Iran including risk profiles and actors of persecution.
